Were at least two of the founders of tencent educated at the same university?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?university (COUNT(?founder) AS ?founderCount) WHERE {
  wd:Q860580 wdt:P112 ?founder.
  ?founder wdt:P69 ?university.
  ?university wdt:P31 wd:Q3918.
}
GROUP BY ?university
HAVING (COUNT(?founder) >= 2)

has life expectancy in iran grown in any year after 1999?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?year ?lifeExpectancy WHERE {
  ?item wdt:P31 wd:Q24575110;  # instance of 'start time'
        wdt:P2250 ?lifeExpectancy;  # life expectancy
        wdt:P585 ?year.  # point in time
  ?item wdt:P361 wd:Q2091.  # part of 1999
  FILTER(YEAR(?year) > 1999)
} ORDER BY ?year

How many French kings didn't die of natural causes?

query.sparql:
SELECT (COUNT(?king) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?king wdt:P31 wd:Q5;  # Instance of human
        wdt:P509 ?causeOfDeath;  # Cause of death
        wdt:P279* wd:Q3739104.  # Exclude natural causes
  ?king wdt:P31 wd:Q12097.  # Instance of French king
  FILTER(?causeOfDeath != wd:Q3739104)
}
